primary_driver.operating_manifestation: Enters situations with direction already forming; pulls team toward action
primary_driver.pressure_manifestation: Under strain, decisiveness increases; moves faster, reads less

secondary_stabilizer.operating_manifestation: Prefers speed; moves to action quickly; impatient with deliberation
secondary_stabilizer.pressure_manifestation: Under strain, speed preference increases; detail drops

opposing_pattern_1.operating_manifestation: Prefers clear process and structure; comfortable with defined roles
opposing_pattern_1.pressure_manifestation: Under strain, structure-preference increases; rigidity increases

opposing_pattern_2.operating_manifestation: Adjusts approach based on context; comfortable with pivot and iteration
opposing_pattern_2.pressure_manifestation: Under strain, flexibility decreases; retreats to familiar patterns

role_fit_analysis.builder_vs_optimizer: Hybrid - Can build or optimize depending on context
role_fit_analysis.explorer_vs_stabilizer: Pragmatic - Explores when needed, stabilizes when required
role_fit_analysis.ambiguity_tolerance: Moderate - Can handle ambiguity with boundaries
natural_roles: Needs dimension refinement for specific role fit

requires: Direct communication culture, tolerance for bluntness
